haphoenix-value.notes: Manager of ISF III Feeder Fund. Also feeder for Coller Capital VIII.

electra-re.notes: Manager of Electra America Multifamily Fund II and Electra BTR 1.

639M36167003.notes: Main USD income (MA6Z9LVT). All investment distributions land here.

639M38742379.notes: EUR income (M7VFNELG). IBI EUR distributions + Vienna.

639M34801376.notes: New USD income (MB37A4EW). Receives rolling deposit interest from Apr 2025.

639M33473534.notes: Capital account (MWF7EDAA). Rolling money-market deposit ~$700K Sep 2025.

vontobel.name: Bank Vontobel AG
vontobel.notes: Swiss equities portfolio. Liquidated ~30 blue-chip Swiss stocks in Mar 2025. Closing balance CHF 1,414,774 as of 2025-03-31. New discovery from prior files.

electra-mif-ii.name: Electra Multifamily Investment Fund II (EMIF II)
electra-mif-ii.notable: Had realization of Vive at Kellswater (Charlotte NC) in June 2022 at 49% IRR / 3.53X equity multiple. Distribution notices #5-#38 available from Tzur. ITD distributions $889,447 as of Dist #38 (Feb 2026). Carried interest to GP started from Dist #34 (Oct 2025, exceeding 8% IRR hurdle per s4.2 LPA). IRR 14.0% as of Sep 2025.

events.note: 2021 K-1, sent by Jenny via The Service

gelfand-maryland-gatewater.name: Gelfand Maryland Gatewater
gelfand-maryland-gatewater.notes: Via Gelfand. Separate from Pelham Park (also Gelfand, but Philadelphia).

beit-mars.name: Beit Mars
beit-mars.notes: Adam's investment (אדם יוסף מרש). Managed under Tamar's FO parent client. 3 deposits: 1.7M + 140K + 41.2K ILS (2025).

pollen-street-iii.name: Pollen Street Credit Fund III - USD
aliases: The Phoenix Credit Strategies Fund L.P - USD
pollen-street-iii.notes: Phoenix Credit Strategies is the same fund. Two Tzur investor numbers - different statement types. All 14 FO distributions now matched to HSBC credits. Lags vary from 0 to 22 days.

ibi-managed-portfolio.name: IBI Managed Portfolio
ibi-managed-portfolio.ibi_pipe_notes: IBI also acts as trustee/pipe for some investments. Confirmed: IBI pipes Boligo 2 distributions to Leumi USD ($8,567 on May 14 2025 = Boligo 2 $8,617 - $50 fee). IBI's Israel Brokerage account: IL660126000000000399420.
ibi-managed-portfolio.notes: Not an investment - a discretionary managed portfolio at HSBC Guernsey. Mix of US equities (S&P 500, NASDAQ 100), US/IL corporate bonds, ETFs. EOY 2023 statement in tmp/more/.

yalin-managed-portfolio.name: Yalin Lapidot Managed Portfolio
yalin-managed-portfolio.notes: Not an investment - a discretionary managed portfolio at HSBC Guernsey. Mix of US equities, US/IL corporate bonds, ETFs. EOY 2023 statement in tmp/more/.

portal_notification.notes: Notification that a document is available on the Apex Israel portal. Some carry PDF attachments, most are link-only. Link-only ones should be tagged and skipped.

capital_statement.notes: Portal notifications that DO carry a PDF attachment are capital statements - these are useful.

observations.duplicate_emails: Emails to tamar@marash.net auto-forward to adam@marash.net, causing duplicate fetches. Dedup needed on content hash.
observations.fo_distribution_pattern: The Service sends distribution notices (Sharon) and quarterly reports (Omer) as separate emails. Distribution notices are in Hebrew with amounts; quarterly reports have PDF attachments.
observations.trustee_distribution_pattern: Tzur Management sends formal distribution notices and capital call confirmations in English with PDF attachments containing exact figures.
observations.investment_currencies: Some investments settle in USD but distributions are reported in ILS by the family office (e.g., Atlanta, Reality Germany). Reality Germany distributions land in ILS account at Bank Leumi. There is an actual ILS settlement step, not just FO reporting conversion.
observations.bank_accounts: Leumi ILS account: 267 txns, Mar 2023 - Mar 2026. Mixed personal + investment. Current balance ILS 100,228. Leumi USD account 24009/32: 47 txns, Apr 2024 - Feb 2026. Current balance $1,417,981.18. Mainly Impact Debt distributions + deposit rollovers. Source was PDF (not HTML-as-XLS like ILS).

leumi_counterparties.10-978-019740061: יזמות דיור מ = Atlanta/Boligo distributions via The Service
leumi_counterparties.12-600-000399420: שרותי בורסה והשק = brokerage/stock exchange services (Reality Germany? other ILS distributions)
leumi_counterparties.10-978-016270092: דה סרוויס = The Service (FO fees, capital call pass-through)
leumi_counterparties.10-978-033450094: א.ב.ג פלנינג = Carmel Credit via The Service

observations.adam_investments: Beit Mars (בית מרס) is in Adam's name (אדם יוסף מרש), managed under Tamar's FO parent client. Confirmed from FO transaction register.
observations.fo_coverage: The Service is FO for many but not all investments. Cyprus Properties is independent of them.
observations.alias_complexity: Investments are referred to differently across sources: FO uses Hebrew shorthand, trustee uses formal English legal names, portal uses yet another variant. Alias matching is essential.
observations.apex_portal_emails: Most Apex portal notifications are link-only (no PDF attachment). A few carry actual PDF capital statements. The link-only ones can be bulk-fetched and tagged as such - no need to revisit.
observations.fo_correction_emails: The Service occasionally sends correction emails when a distribution notice referenced the wrong investment. Seen: Sharon mixed up Pelham and Gelfand Maryland (2022-08-29). System needs to handle these gracefully.
observations.ils_distribution_pattern: Several USD-denominated investments have distributions reported in ILS by the FO (Pelham Park, Atlanta, Netz). This reflects actual ILS settlement at Bank Leumi, not just reporting conversion.
observations.gelfand_disambiguation: RESOLVED: Pelham Park (Philadelphia) and Gelfand Maryland Gatewater (Maryland) are two separate investments, both via Gelfand. Confirmed by wealthy DB.
observations.boligo_disambiguation: RESOLVED: Atlanta Senior Living and Boligo are the same investment. 'Boligo' is the deal name, 'Atlanta Senior Living' / 'דיור מוגן אטלנטה' is the descriptive name. Confirmed by wealthy DB.
observations.impact_two_funds: Impact Capital manages two separate funds: Impact Debt FOF ($1M commitment) and Impact Real Estate FOF ($407,701 commitment).
observations.vienna_two_investments: Two separate Vienna investments: Vienna Apartment Hotel / Serviced Apartments (EUR 600K) and Residence Vienna 1 (EUR 510K).
observations.total_investments: 26 investments + 2 managed portfolios. Phoenix Credit Strategies merged into Pollen Street III (same fund). Most in Tamar's name.
observations.wealthy_db_source: Investment list and commitment amounts cross-referenced with ~/projects/wealthy/database/database.sqlite (Laravel project). 28 investments, 334 transactions.

transfer_fees.notes: Flat fees deducted between FO-reported distribution and HSBC receipt. Per-investment. Based on full history matching (2019-2026).

electra-mif-ii.notes: ~$25 historically, increased to ~$45-55 from mid-2025 (Dists #31+). Carried interest deductions started Dist #34 (Oct 2025).

liquidity-capital-ii.notes: Can aggregate withdrawal + yield into single wire.

pollen-street-iii.notes: First dists had $20-25 fee, later mostly $0 or $25-35. Lags can reach 22 days.

frgx.notes: Two settlement modes: quick (1-8d, small/no fee) and quarterly (~38d lag). JPM returned wires in late 2025 per internal policy.

gatewater-landing.notes: Last distribution Nov 2023. Investment winding down.

funding_bank.notes: Which bank account funded each investment (capital calls go out from here). Important for KYC linkage.
funding_bank.unknown: Most investments predate the HSBC 2025 statement. Historical funding routes not yet determined.

hsbc_wire_senders.notes: Counterparty names as they appear on HSBC GU bank statements. Confirmed from 152 individual PDF statements (Q1 2024 - Q3 2025).

settlement_routing.notes: Where distributions land. Determined by which FO withdrawals match HSBC credits vs which don't.
settlement_routing.notes_detail: HSBC-routed investments confirmed by matching FO records to HSBC credits (149 credits: 113 matched, 10 probable, 2 personal_transfer, 6 pre_fo, 3 interest, 2 capital_deposit, 1 post_fo, 12 unidentified). Counterparties confirmed from 152 individual PDF statements. IBI pipes Caliber + Electra BTR to USD income, Vienna apartments to EUR income, Boligo 2 to Leumi USD.

notes: PIMCO: appeared in Feb 2026 email (אדם מרש - PIMCO) with 2 PDFs. New investment? In Adam's name.
Fortress (פורטרס): appears in Jan-Mar 2026 emails as quarterly report sender. Covers Boligo, Vienna, Beit Mars, Gatewater, REI.
Netz 2: referenced in FO quarterly summary subject ('סיכום רבעון 2, 2020 קרן נץ 2') - confirms Netz 2 exists as separate from Netz New Haven.
